name: WiamApp
pitch: WiamApp connects customers with verified skilled workers in their city — electricians, plumbers, cleaners, and more. Book in real time. Pay securely. Build trust.
features: Verified worker profiles and WiaMid identity
Spotlight, trust scores, and safety systems
pricingIntro: Free for customers. Workers keep booking for free — paid plans are optional, for workers who want more visibility.

pricingPlans.name: Customer
pricingPlans.description: Book verified workers, chat, and pay securely. No fees to browse or book.

pricingPlans.name: Worker — Standard
pricingPlans.description: List your services, get booked, get paid. No subscription required to start earning.
features: Accept bookings and get paid via escrow

pricingPlans.name: Worker — Pro
pricingPlans.billingNote: Charged in GHS at checkout — matches subscription_config price_usd_web
pricingPlans.description: Priority placement and extra tools for workers who want more bookings.

businessPricingIntro: For hotels, hospitals, and offices booking workers at scale — team management, billing, and contracts from one dashboard.

businessPricingPlans.name: Starter
businessPricingPlans.billingNote: Charged in GHS at checkout — up to 5 team members
businessPricingPlans.description: Everything a small team needs to book trusted workers and manage them in one place.

businessPricingPlans.name: Growth
businessPricingPlans.billingNote: Charged in GHS at checkout — up to 25 team members
businessPricingPlans.description: For growing companies that assign jobs, run contracts, and need deeper reporting.

businessPricingPlans.name: Enterprise
businessPricingPlans.billingNote: Unlimited team members — sold with onboarding support
businessPricingPlans.description: Multi-location management, invoicing, SLA tools, and API access for large organizations.

name: WiamPass
pitch: WiamPass makes selling and scanning event tickets simple — pay by card or Mobile Money, get a QR ticket instantly, and let organizers scan attendees in seconds.
features: Card and Mobile Money checkout via Paystack
Organizer dashboard for events and check-in
pricingIntro: Free to create an event. WiamPass takes a small platform fee only on tickets actually sold.

pricingPlans.name: Organizer — Standard
pricingPlans.billingNote: PLACEHOLDER — replace with your real platform fee percentage
pricingPlans.description: Create and sell tickets for your event with zero upfront cost.

pricingPlans.name: Attendee
pricingPlans.description: Ticket price plus a small transparent service fee shown before checkout.
features: Pay by card or Mobile Money

name: WiamTrade
tagline: Trade crypto, forex, and African stocks — your keys, your funds.
pitch: WiamTrade is a non-custodial trading experience inside Telegram. Practice with $1M virtual on live charts, or connect your broker when you are ready for live trading.
features: Practice mode — crypto, forex, stocks (no broker keys required)
Live mode — connect Binance and more
Live charts and African currency display
pricingIntro: Practice mode is free forever. Pro unlocks live broker connections and advanced tools.

pricingPlans.name: Practice
pricingPlans.description: Trade with $1M in virtual funds on live market charts. No broker account needed.
features: Live crypto, forex, and African stock charts

pricingPlans.name: Pro
pricingPlans.description: Connect a real broker and trade live, with advanced tools.
